reviews.comment:
Las YPF en general tienen buenos precios y buena atención.  No me gustó , que en el camino por ruta 2 no me dejaron almorzar con mi perrita que es chiquita y hacia mucho calor. Te mandan afuera

(Translated by Google)
YPF generally has good prices and good service. I didn't like that on the way on Route 2, they wouldn't let me have lunch with my little dog, and it was very hot. They send you outside.
